paragraph: Single-family homes in Lyndhurst are moving in a real seller's market. The median price sits at $585,000 with a sale-to-list ratio of 1.00 and more than half of homes selling above asking. The median time on market of 23 days is short enough that buyers need to be ready to move when they find the right property. Multi-family properties are even hotter, with 29 sales at a $850,000 median and nearly 62 percent of sales closing above list price. The ratio here climbs to 1.03, signaling genuine competition among buyers willing to bid up from the asking price. Condos and townhouses round out the market at a $410,000 median with 8 sales over the period. These units are sparse, but when they do hit the market they're attracting attention. Three-quarters of them sold above asking, and the median days on market of 13.5 days is the fastest of any tier. If you're looking in Lyndhurst right now, expect to move quickly on anything that fits your criteria. Sellers across all three tiers are in a position to wait for strong offers rather than price aggressively for speed.
